# (regenerated on every `cargo test` by zenutils-apidoc; ZEN_API_DOC=check verifies, =off skips).

#[non_exhaustive] pub enum JxlError
pub JxlError::Cancelled(enough::reason::StopReason)
pub JxlError::Decode(zenjxl_decoder::error::Error)
pub JxlError::Encode(jxl_encoder::api::EncodeError)
pub JxlError::InvalidInput(alloc::string::String)
pub JxlError::LimitExceeded(alloc::string::String)
pub JxlError::Sink(zencodec::sink::SinkError)
pub JxlError::UnsupportedOperation(zencodec::capabilities::UnsupportedOperation)

pub JxlExtraChannelType::Black
pub JxlExtraChannelType::Cfa

pub JxlExtraChannelType::SelectionMask

pub JxlExtraChannelType::Unknown(u32)
#[non_exhaustive] pub enum ValidationError

pub ValidationError::DistanceOutOfRange::valid: core::ops::range::RangeInclusive<f32>
pub ValidationError::DistanceOutOfRange::value: f32

pub struct JxlDecodeOutput

pub JxlDecodeOutput::info: JxlInfo
pub JxlDecodeOutput::pixels: zenpixels::buffer::PixelBuffer
pub struct JxlExtraChannelInfo
pub JxlExtraChannelInfo::alpha_associated: bool
pub JxlExtraChannelInfo::bits_per_sample: u8
pub JxlExtraChannelInfo::channel_type: JxlExtraChannelType
pub JxlExtraChannelInfo::dim_shift: u8
pub JxlExtraChannelInfo::name: core::option::Option<alloc::string::String>
#[non_exhaustive] pub struct JxlInfo
pub JxlInfo::bit_depth: core::option::Option<u8>
pub JxlInfo::cicp: core::option::Option<(u8, u8, u8, bool)>
pub JxlInfo::coded_height: u32
pub JxlInfo::coded_width: u32
pub JxlInfo::exif: core::option::Option<alloc::vec::Vec<u8>>
pub JxlInfo::extra_channels: alloc::vec::Vec<JxlExtraChannelInfo>
pub JxlInfo::has_alpha: bool
pub JxlInfo::has_animation: bool
pub JxlInfo::height: u32
pub JxlInfo::icc_profile: core::option::Option<alloc::vec::Vec<u8>>
pub JxlInfo::intensity_target: f32
pub JxlInfo::intrinsic_orientation: u8
pub JxlInfo::intrinsic_size: core::option::Option<(u32, u32)>
pub JxlInfo::is_gray: bool
pub JxlInfo::linear_below: f32
pub JxlInfo::min_nits: f32
pub JxlInfo::orientation: u8
pub JxlInfo::preview_size: core::option::Option<(u32, u32)>
pub JxlInfo::relative_to_max_display: bool
pub JxlInfo::width: u32
pub JxlInfo::xmp: core::option::Option<alloc::vec::Vec<u8>>
pub JxlInfo::xyb_encoded: bool
pub struct JxlLimits
pub JxlLimits::max_memory_bytes: core::option::Option<u64>
pub JxlLimits::max_pixels: core::option::Option<u64>
pub fn decode(&[u8], core::option::Option<&JxlLimits>, &[zenpixels::descriptor::PixelDescriptor]) -> core::result::Result<JxlDecodeOutput, whereat::at::At<JxlError>>
pub fn decode_with_options(&[u8], core::option::Option<&JxlLimits>, &[zenpixels::descriptor::PixelDescriptor], core::option::Option<bool>, core::option::Option<alloc::sync::Arc<dyn enough::Stop>>) -> core::result::Result<JxlDecodeOutput, whereat::at::At<JxlError>>
pub fn decode_with_parallel(&[u8], core::option::Option<&JxlLimits>, &[zenpixels::descriptor::PixelDescriptor], core::option::Option<bool>) -> core::result::Result<JxlDecodeOutput, whereat::at::At<JxlError>>
pub fn probe(&[u8]) -> core::result::Result<JxlInfo, whereat::at::At<JxlError>>

## trait impls (7 types)

ValidationError: Clone, Debug, Display, Error
